customer_name: HOO Haven, Inc. DBA Hoo Haven Wildlife Rehabilitation & Ed

citations.narrative:
Two pigeons were seen housed in the same enclosure with one of the educational rabbits. They did not appear to be
incompatible, however rabbits cannot be housed with any other species unless it is required for scientific reasons. Ensure
that rabbits are not housed in the same enclosure as other species.
***Correct by 3/12/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
